services.title: Program Design & Management
services.description: End-to-end design of social impact programs — from theory of change to implementation planning, budgeting, and adaptive management.

services.title: Monitoring & Evaluation
services.description: Design and execution of M&E systems that produce actionable insights, not just compliance reports.

services.title: Research & Data Analysis
services.description: Mixed-methods research using Tableau, R, Stata, and Dedoose. Translating complex data into clear, compelling narratives.

services.title: Grant Writing & Proposals
services.description: Compelling funding proposals grounded in evidence, aligned to funder priorities, and built on strong program logic.

services.title: Community Outreach & Engagement
services.description: Culturally responsive engagement strategies that build trust, center community voice, and drive participation.

services.title: Training & Capacity Building
services.description: Workshop design and facilitation for NGO staff, government partners, and community leaders.

services.title: Policy Analysis & Advocacy
services.description: Evidence-based policy briefs, advocacy strategies, and analysis for NGOs, foundations, and government agencies.
